justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's date and time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering concrete alternatives.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made a slightly redundant API call in Turn 5 by re-checking June 11th for later in the day, which it had already implicitly covered by checking the full working day on June 12th.
justifications.customer_experience: The repeated apologies and the agent's inability to proactively suggest alternative times made the conversation feel a bit tiring for the customer.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered by checking the requested dates, but it did not proactively suggest alternative slots or broader search ranges until prompted by the user.
